name: thinkers
description: v0.1.0 — A reasoning counselor backed by a 243-pattern reference corpus — cognitive biases, fallacies, persuasion and manipulation tactics, bad-faith moves, and strategies. Five skills: identify what's happening (including self-recognition of your own behavior), explain a named pattern, practice spotting them, work through a decision, and stress-test your thinking. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
